title: More Paths
description: Adds more unique Path Blocks to Minecraft.
body:
# More Paths
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-paths)
[![fabric-api](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

![A Dirt Path transitioning to Warped, and Crimson Nylium Paths.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/o9BYIzF3/images/f1368c495de96c5c5681451402d0ff50e707a0e4.png)

Adds more unique Path Blocks to Minecraft. Currently Nether Nylium Paths.

### Paths
- Adds Crimson and Warped Nylium Paths.
    - Both are produced by right-clicking the respective Nylium with a shovel.
    - Both can be mined with Silk Touch to drop the item.

### Vanilla Changes
- Dirt Paths now can be mined with Silk Touch to drop the item.

## Dependencies
- Fabric API
